infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Polaris Maps needs your location to show your position on the map and provide navigation directions.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Polaris Maps uses your location in the background to contribute anonymous traffic data to the P2P network.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Polaris Maps uses the camera to capture street-level imagery for the community.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Polaris Maps uses your location in the background to contribute anonymous traffic data.

plugins.cameraPermission: Polaris Maps uses the camera to capture street-level imagery.
